title: Epic Death Screen
description: This project replaces the vanilla death screen in Minecraft with a cinematic custom sequence featuring a black screen, VHS-style interference, heartbeat and heavy breathing audio, and random motivational lines in English and Russian. The mod a
body:
# Epic Death Screen
Epic Death Screen replaces Minecraft's default death screen with a cinematic custom sequence.

Instead of the vanilla death menu appearing instantly, the player gets a stylized blackout scene with heartbeat and heavy breathing audio, VHS-inspired visual noise, scanlines, chromatic distortion, and randomized motivational messages. The effect is designed to make dying feel dramatic instead of abrupt.

![Death screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/450b6b99647a4eb8a26ea71070a018755438a75d.gif)

The mod includes:
- a full custom death sequence instead of the vanilla death screen
- blackout, VHS noise, scanlines, tracking artifacts, and text distortion
- themed visual and audio variations based on the cause of death
- large pools of random lines in English and Russian
- configurable scene duration
- configurable heartbeat and breathing volume
- configurable VHS intensity
- configurable chromatic aberration strength
- optional auto-respawn
- in-game config screen on supported loaders

Supported versions:
- Fabric 1.20.1
- Fabric 1.21.1
- Forge 1.21.1
- NeoForge 1.21.1
- Forge 1.12.2
